description.value:
Trigger A creature tries to open the crate without removing the runes

Effect The four runes become active with a flash of red light. Each creature in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:42] save. The trap then rolls initiative.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is slightly dazed by the flash, taking a –2 circumstance penalty to their initiative.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Blinded] for 1 round and takes a –2 circumstance penalty to their initiative.

Critical Failure The target is blinded for 1 minute and takes a –4 circumstance penalty to their initiative.

details.description: Four invisible runes on a large crate conjure jets of flame and whips of force when someone tries to open the container.
details.disable: @Check[thievery|dc:45] (master) to erase each rune, @Check[arcana|dc:48] (master) to channel energy from one rune into another, destroying both, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Dispel Magic] (8th rank; counteract DC 45) to counteract each rune; a PC can choose to disable a fire rune or a force rune (or choose randomly)
details.reset: The runes deactivate after 1 minute, but if at least one rune remains, the trap reactivates 1 round after that.
details.routine: (4 actions) The trap has 1 fewer action for each rune that's been disabled or destroyed; whether that rune was a fire rune or a force rune affects the actions the trap can take. On the trap's initiative, the two fire runes each blast @Template[type:cone|distance:30]s of flame as an action in opposite directions that deal @Damage[12d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:44|basic] save). Then the two force runes each make a force whip Strike as an action against different targets.
